note.en: Pure PvP. Gift of Skirmishing shared with The Ascension. Mystic Tribute shared with gen2. Precursor = Mist Pendant (ascended PvP amulet).

the_ascension.name: The Ascension
the_ascension.recipe: MF : Wings of Ascension + Gift of Fortune + Gift of Skirmishing + Gift of the Competitor

note.fr: One-time uniquement (Gift of the Competitor non répétable). Gift of Skirmishing partagé avec Transcendence. Gift of Fortune = gen1 (partagé).
note.en: One-time only (Gift of the Competitor not repeatable). Gift of Skirmishing shared with Transcendence. Gift of Fortune = gen1 (shared).

ad_infinitum.name: Ad Infinitum
ad_infinitum.recipe: MF : Unbound + Gift of Fortune + Gift of Infinity + Gift of Ascension

note.fr: 4 collections de fractales requises (Ad Infinitum I→III pour Unbound, puis IV pour Gift of Infinity). ~40-56 jours minimum sans CM. Gift of Fortune = gen1 (partagé).
note.en: 4 fractal collections required (Ad Infinitum I→III for Unbound, then IV for Gift of Infinity). ~40-56 days minimum without CM. Gift of Fortune = gen1 (shared).

ad_infinitum.armory_note: Probable apiId 80225 — to confirm live (74155 = Astralaria gen2 axe, conflict avoided)

endless_summer.name: Endless Summer
endless_summer.recipe: MF : Gift of Rays + Gift of the Survivors + Gift of the People + Gift of the Hylek

note.fr: Entièrement PvE open-world VoE. Aucun Gift of Battle requis — premier anneau légendaire 100 % PvE farmable en solo. 2 exemplaires possibles (armory).
note.en: Entirely open-world PvE VoE. No Gift of Battle required — first purely PvE legendary ring farmable solo. 2 copies possible (armory).

stella_radians.name: Stella Radians
stella_radians.recipe: MF : Vial of Liquid Shadowstone + Gift of Shadowstones + Gift of Galdra + Mystic Tribute

note.fr: Première accessory 100% PvE sans Gift of Battle. Mystic Tribute partagé avec gen2/Transcendence. 2 copies craftables. Patch 12 mai 2026.
note.en: First 100% PvE accessory without Gift of Battle. Mystic Tribute shared with gen2/Transcendence. 2 craftable copies. Patch May 12, 2026.

armory_note.fr: Ajouté en mai 2026 — apiId à confirmer via l'API.
armory_note.en: Added May 2026 — apiId to confirm via API.

strife_unending.name: Strife Unending
strife_unending.recipe: Direct purchase from Dugan (WvW) after completing Mists Research: Strife Unending achievement.

note.fr: Pas de craft MF. Obtenue chez Dugan en McM après le succès dédié. Le visuel évolue avec les kills McM. 2 exemplaires obtenus. Patch du 12 mai 2026.
note.en: No MF craft. Obtained from Dugan in WvW after completing the dedicated achievement. Visual evolves with WvW kills. 2 copies obtained. Patch May 12, 2026.

orrax_manifested.name: Orrax Manifested
orrax_manifested.recipe: MF : Orrax Contained + Gift of the Mistburned Isles + Gift of Shadows + Gift of the Feast

note.fr: Verrou d'histoire : Salvation's Cost (JW) requis. Précurseur Orrax Contained via la collection « Unknown Nightmares ». Gift of the Feast requiert le node de homestead Fruits of the Shadow (Deft Lahar). Skin de deltaplane débloqué automatiquement.
note.en: Story gate: Salvation's Cost (JW) required. Orrax Contained precursor via 'Unknown Nightmares' collection. Gift of the Feast requires the Fruits of the Shadow homestead node (Deft Lahar). Glider skin unlocked automatically.

klobjarne_geirr.name: Klobjarne Geirr
klobjarne_geirr.farm: PvE (JW — Lowland Shore, Janthir Syntri, Convergences, Mount Balrior)
klobjarne_geirr.recipe: MF : Nyr Hrammr + Gift of Janthir Wilds + Gift of the Homesteader + Gift of Klobjarne Geirr

note.fr: 6 skins variantes auto-débloqués à la liaison. Gift of Janthir Wilds = équivalent JW du Gift of Maguuma/Desert Mastery. Gift of the Homesteader inclut Gift of Metal (déjà présent) + Recollector achievement.
note.en: 6 variant skins auto-unlocked on binding. Gift of Janthir Wilds = JW equivalent of Gift of Maguuma/Desert Mastery. Gift of the Homesteader includes Gift of Metal (already listed) + Recollector achievement.

aetheric_anchor.name: Aetheric Anchor (→ Ancora Pax + Ancora Bellum)
aetheric_anchor.recipe: MF : Gift of the Survivors + Gift of the People + Gift of Insight (VoE) + Gift of the Elders

note.fr: Produit un conteneur qui débloque Ancora Pax (bâton) ET Ancora Bellum (lance) simultanément. ⚠️ Gift of Insight (VoE) s'achète chez un vendeur (Magister Sirkk) — NE PAS mettre en MF (produit un Draconic Tribute). Pas de précurseur séparé.
note.en: Produces a container that unlocks Ancora Pax (staff) AND Ancora Bellum (spear) simultaneously. ⚠️ Gift of Insight (VoE) is a vendor purchase (Magister Sirkk) — DO NOT put in MF (produces Draconic Tribute). No separate precursor.

armory_note.fr: Container — unlock Ancora Pax (106712?) + Ancora Bellum. Vérifier apiIds Ancora.
armory_note.en: Container - unlocks Ancora Pax (106712?) + Ancora Bellum. Verify Ancora apiIds.

selachimorpha.name: Selachimorpha
selachimorpha.farm: PvE (VoE — Shipwreck Strand, Starlit Weald, Castora maps)
selachimorpha.recipe: MF : Gift of the Survivors + Gift of the People + Gift of Castoran Mastery + Agaleus

note.fr: Précurseur Agaleus via collection 'Acquiring Agaleus' (24 étapes, VoE maps). Partage Gift of the Survivors/People avec Aetheric Anchor et Endless Summer.
note.en: Agaleus precursor via the 'Acquiring Agaleus' collection (24 steps, VoE maps). Shares Gift of the Survivors/People with Aetheric Anchor and Endless Summer.

selachimorpha.armory_note: 105921 vérifié (calculateur gw2efficiency) — 1 des 3 poids. Les 2 autres IDs (light/medium/heavy) à compléter au premier craft ; le container 105743 délivre les 3, donc la détection fonctionne dès l'obtention.

totals.note: Chiffres GuildJen (nov 2025) : 55 clovers, 5000 Research Notes. Obsidian Shards + Bloodstone Shard via Gift of Castoran Mastery (wiki). Unusual Coins = monnaie map VoE (coffres Mirror, metas Castora), montant total variable selon achats.

legendary_rune.name: Legendary Rune
legendary_rune.recipe: MF : Gift of Runes + Gift of Condensed Magic + Gift of Condensed Might + Gift of Craftsmanship

note.fr: 6 runes requises pour un set d'armure complet (7 max dans l'armory). Craft standard 400. Gift of Condensed Magic/Might déjà dans craft_components. Lyhr (SotO) ou Ward Crafter Lucirae (JW) permettent l'achat direct des sous-gifts contre des Ectos.
note.en: 6 runes required for a full armor set (7 max in armory). Standard crafting 400. Gift of Condensed Magic/Might already in craft_components. Lyhr (SotO) or Ward Crafter Lucirae (JW) allow direct purchase of sub-gifts for Ectos.

legendary_sigil.name: Legendary Sigil
legendary_sigil.recipe: MF : Gift of Sigils + Gift of Condensed Magic + Gift of Condensed Might + Gift of Craftsmanship

note.fr: 8 sigils max dans l'armory (emplacements d'arme terrestre + aquatique). Même structure que la Legendary Rune, avec Gift of Sigils (T6 Might) au lieu de Gift of Runes (T6 Magic). Partagent Gift of Condensed Magic/Might/Craftsmanship.
note.en: 8 sigils max in armory (land + aquatic weapon slots). Same structure as Legendary Rune except Gift of Sigils (T6 Might) vs Gift of Runes (T6 Magic). Share Gift of Condensed Magic/Might/Craftsmanship.

legendary_relic.name: Legendary Relic
legendary_relic.recipe: MF : Gift of Relics + Gift of Condensed Magic + Gift of Condensed Might + Gift of Craftsmanship

note.fr: Gift of Relics = 25 Mystic Facets (750 Piles of Lucent Crystal + 1 Relic élevée chacun, MF) + Gift of the Obscure + Gift of Condensed Magic/Might. ~18 750 Piles of Lucent Crystal au total (187 500 Lucent Motes).
note.en: Gift of Relics = 25 Mystic Facets (750 Piles of Lucent Crystal + 1 Relic ascended chacun, MF) + Gift of the Obscure + Gift of Condensed Magic/Might. ~18 750 Piles of Lucent Crystal total (187 500 Lucent Motes).

perfected_envoy.name: Perfected Envoy Armor
perfected_envoy.recipe_per_piece: MF : Refined Envoy piece + Gift of Prosperity + Gift of Prowess + Gift of Dedication

note.fr: 25 LI + 50 Obsidian Shards par pièce. Précurseur via les collections Envoy Armor I & II.
note.en: 25 LI + 50 Obsidian Shards per piece. Precursor via Envoy Armor I & II collections.

armory_note.fr: 6 pièces — apiId par pièce (tête/épaules/torse/gants/jambes/bottes) × 3 types (léger/intermédiaire/lourd). Mapping non trivial. Détection via armory : compter ≥ 6 pièces du bon type.
armory_note.en: 6 pieces — apiId per piece (head/shoulders/chest/gloves/legs/boots) × 3 types (light/medium/heavy). Not straightforward to map. Detected via armory: count ≥ 6 pieces of the correct type.

note.fr: Détecter via /v2/account/legendaryarmory : chercher items avec type=Armor de rarity=Legendary. Compter par armor_type (Light/Medium/Heavy). 6 pièces = set complet.
note.en: Detect via /v2/account/legendaryarmory: look for items with type=Armor and rarity=Legendary. Count by armor_type (Light/Medium/Heavy). 6 pieces = full set.

obsidian.name: Obsidian Armor
obsidian.recipe_per_piece: Craft 500 : 1 Arcanum of Astral X + 1 Gift of Expertise + 1 Gift of Stormy Skies + 1 Gift of Magical/Mighty Prosperity
obsidian.note: Arcanum (par slot) requiert skins Astral Ward + Oneiros-Spun (12 Purified one-time) + kill de boss + 1 Lesser Vision Crystal.
obsidian.armory_note: 6 pieces × 3 armor types. Same pattern as Perfected Envoy.

armory_slot_ids.note: Mapping id→(poids,slot) résolu au runtime via /v2/items?ids=…&lang=xx (weight_class + details.type). Seul mapping confirmé statiquement : 101516 = Obsidian Light Crown.

note.fr: 1 095 Skirmish Tickets par pièce.
note.en: 1,095 Skirmish Tickets per piece.

note.en: WvW legendary armor. apiIds to confirm via API.

vision.name: Vision
vision.recipe: MF : Gift of Prescience + Gift of Desert Mastery + Gift of Energy + Coalescence

note.fr: Accessoire légendaire (LW4). Requiert Coalescence comme composant. Synergie visuelle avec Aurora et Coalescence. Farm principal : metas HoT (Elegy Mosaic via collections Requiem) + Désert de Cristal (Kralkatite Ore, Difluorite Crystal, Inscribed Shard).
note.en: Legendary accessory (LW4). Requires Coalescence as a component. Visually synergizes with Aurora and Coalescence. Main farm: HoT metas (Elegy Mosaic via Requiem collections) + Crystal Desert (Kralkatite Ore, Difluorite Crystal, Inscribed Shard).

note.fr: 1 Memory Essence Encapsulator par sous-collection (6 zones LW4). Craft Artificer 400 — la recette doit être achetée.
note.en: 1 Memory Essence Encapsulator per sub-collection (6 LW4 zones). Artificer 400 craft — recipe must be purchased.

note.fr: Anneau légendaire (LW4), obtenu principalement via les Raids (Wing 1–5). Composant requis pour Vision. Synergie visuelle avec Aurora et Vision. Farm : Raid Proofs + Ball of Dark Energy.
note.en: Legendary ring (LW4), obtained mainly via Raids (Wing 1–5). Required component for Vision. Visually synergizes with Aurora and Vision. Farm: Raid Proofs + Ball of Dark Energy.

t6_tracker.name: Matériaux T6
t6_tracker.demand_table: 1 paire Condensed (Magic+Might) = 200 de CHAQUE T6. Demandes : pièce Obsidienne = 1 paire ; rune/sigil/relique = 1 paire ; Coalescence (Mystic Tribute) = 2 paires ; arme gen3 (Draconic Tribute) = 1 paire. Gen1/Warbringer : Gifts of Might/Magic classiques = 250 de chaque T6 de la famille.
efficient_sources: Circuit Eternal Ice (IBS) : strikes quotidiennes (~90-100 shards/j, 30-45 min) ou Drakkar + coffres Bjora Marches → conversion Eye of the North (75 shards → monnaie LW4 → Volatile Magic, sans limite)
Trophy Shipments : 250 Volatile Magic + 1 po chez les vendors LW4 — trophées T5/T6, ~2-5 po de valeur ; LA source de volume
Volatile Magic direct : Dragonfall meta (~meilleure carte VM), train LW4 quotidien
Promotion T5→T6 en Forge Mystique : 250 T5 + dust + spirit shards → 5-12 T6 (~35-50/stack) ; rentabilité variable, vérifier gw2efficiency (venom sacs et claws souvent non rentables)
TP : acheter directement les T6 déficitaires en fin de parcours plutôt que sur-farmer

eotn_details.vendor: Kjep Corrson : 75 Eternal Ice Shards → sachet de 25 monnaies de carte LW4 (au choix), sans limite ; échanges aussi contre Volatile Magic
eotn_details.pof_note: Exception du hub : les vendors Eternal Ice et Hatched Chili fonctionnent même sans PoF (les autres services de Lady Camilla requièrent PoF+IBS)
eotn_details.shipments: Trophy Shipments : 250 VM + 1 po chez les Volatile Magic Collectors de chaque carte LW4 (près des waypoints principaux). Éviter les Material Shipments.
